amazon-ssm-agent.reason: SSM agent 3.3.4177.0 requires Go 1.25 and uses godebug block directive (Go 1.21+). Scarthgap ships Go 1.22.

aws-greengrass-component-sdk.reason: v1.0.1 uses Rust edition 2024 and no_std with cdylib. Scarthgap has older Rust toolchain requiring edition 2021 downgrade patches. Dedicated rework needed.

kirkstone._branch_note: Deprecated. EOL April 2026. Final release: kirkstone-2026.15.0. No further updates.
